name: 17 Springs Tennis and Pickleball Complex
description: 17 Springs Tennis and Pickleball Complex is a place to play pickleball in Millbrook, AL. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: The Fields at 17 Springs
description: Come play pickleball at The Fields at 17 Springs in Millbrook, AL! There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Wetumpka Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Wetumpka Sports Complex in Wetumpka, AL! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts are free.
